prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `692cd3b6`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package at [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/__init__.py), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/helpers.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/notes.md). The rule is: each `2`/`5` frame has one opening; the output fills the monotone overlap between the two cells just outside those openings, then adds one monotone connector from each opening into that overlap.

I discarded the detailed summary hint and documented why in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_692cd3b6/notes.md): “fill the rectangle between the openings” overfills the official examples. The generator stays on-family by explicitly placing the official 3x3 frame motifs on a 15x15 black grid, constructing the same bridge region directly, and then applying a random dihedral symmetry. No new primitive in `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was needed.

Validation is complete: official verification passed `4/4`, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and the artifacts were produced at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/previews/preview_03.png). The built [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/692cd3b6/task.json) contains 1000 generated examples.
